name: Fit Forge
tagline: An exercise app generated by claude
author: justinlboyer

model_card.intended_use: For people who want an exercise app that is self hosted
model_card.not_for: Not for people who want a fully featured exercise app with a polished UI
model_card.limitations: No videos, need to look up exercises, if you are unfamiliar.
model_card.getting_started:
1. run `docker compose up -d`
2. run `python manage.py migrate` 
3. run `python manage.py seed_exercises`
